textByHash.667e70515252b16183508d6c2c5f9e3360857e55: Hello there. Interested in sailing to the island of Aldarin? It's 20 coins for the journey.
textByHash.f51f7d9dc4d1537a26ca41fdd32d4c327a7c8b4b: Come back when you've got 20 coins for me.
textByHash.d71438fbece10952cc86dcc8674fc566abad14fd: Sounds good to me. Hop aboard!
textByHash.9b4f3af3b8b200b0bf3186ff686697705dd693d6: Hello there. Interested in sailing to Sunset Coast? It's 20 coins for the journey.
